creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 208772
update qmapshack to 1.14.0

here's qmapshack 1.14.0.
The project has been moved to github, URLs have been changed in pkg-descr and Makefile. Some polishing in USES. Additional patchwork: prevent a crash when not getting info on devices back from dbus (this happens when an nvme device (nvd*) is installed in the system, bsdisks doesn't handle these yet). (already reported upstream).
Else trivial, passes poudriere and seems generally usable.
